baseline.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, repo snapshot rebuilds with project caches and CodeGraphContext CLI health cleared before each run
baseline.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs forcing repo/project caches and the broken CodeGraphContext CLI health signal to reset before each buildRepoSnapshot(project) call

result.source: mission-control control-plane benchmark, repo snapshot rebuilds after the broken CodeGraphContext CLI health signal has been detected once
result.measurementMethod: Average wall-clock time across 5 runs clearing repo/project caches but reusing the detected broken CLI health before each buildRepoSnapshot(project) call

environment.note: This proof is environment-specific: the current host has a cgc launcher on PATH that fails with ModuleNotFoundError before CodeGraphContext can start.
